call_transfer_rules.fail_message: Our on-call engineering team has been notified. Someone will contact you within {10 minutes for hospital clients, 20 minutes for others}.

integration_constraints: no auto job creation in ServiceTrade
questions_or_unknowns: ask callers if they are currently on a maintenance contract when preventive maintenance program launches
notes: VIP accounts: Vanderbilt University Medical Center, Saint Thomas Hospital, Marriott properties, Nashville Predators or Tennessee Titans facility, government building or federal facility. Special date range exception: week between Christmas and New Year treated as after hours.
